papers_mined.title: Maasai People Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Morans (ilmurran) = young warriors post-circumcision; physical guardians; cattle protection + raid.

papers_mined.title: Enkipaata Eunoto Olng'esherr UNESCO
papers_mined.note: 3 male rites of passage: Enkipaata (induction) + Eunoto (warrior→junior-elder) + Olng'esherr (meat-eating, end of moranism).

papers_mined.title: Maasai Walk to Manhood Google Arts
papers_mined.note: Manyatta (emanyatta) circle of huts where junior warriors live 5-7 years (occasionally 8-12); arts of survival + cattle-raid + warfare.

papers_mined.note: Age-sets named cohorts every ~15 years; once-set always-set; whole cohort transitions together → basin-stable group identity.
